samples.name: The Motor City Sentinel
samples.concept: A Detroit mechanic and body-shop owner transformed by the Pulse into a powered-suit hero, using armor, gadgets, and machine interface abilities to protect the city.

samples.name: Wraith
samples.concept: A ghostly enhanced hero who phases between the living world and Limbo/Purgatory, slipping through walls, avoiding harm, and speaking with spirits of the dead.

samples.name: Threshold
samples.concept: A former security guard transformed by "the Pulse," who uses his powers to spot trouble and stand between danger and civilians.
